---
title: "Environmental Geography"
subtitle: "Human-environment interactions, ecosystems, and contemporary environmental challenges."
author: "Geography Team"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
---





Welcome to the **Environmental Geography** module of Geography OpenCourseWare. This course bridges physical and human geography by examining the complex interactions between human societies and the natural environment — from ecosystem dynamics to contemporary environmental crises.

---

## UGC NET Syllabus

* **Components: Ecosystem (Geographic Classification) and Human Ecology.**
* **Functions: Trophic Levels, Energy Flows, Cycles (geo-chemical, carbon, nitrogen and oxygen), Food Chain, Food Web and Ecological Pyramid.**
* **Human Interaction and Impacts, Environmental Ethics and Deep Ecology.**
* **Environmental Hazards and Disasters (Global Warming, Urban Heat Island, Atmospheric Pollution, Water Pollution, Land Degradation).**
* **National Programmes and Policies: Legal Framework, Environmental Policy, International Treaties, International Programmes and Polices (Brundtland Commission, Kyoto Protocol, Agenda 21, Sustainable Development Goals, Paris Agreement).**

---

{{< include environmental/biodiversity-and-its-depletion-natural-and-human-induced-causes.md >}}

{{< include environmental/biogeography.md >}}

{{< include environmental/classification-and-distribution-of-soils.md >}}

{{< include environmental/conservation-and-management-of-ecosystems.md >}}

{{< include environmental/course-content.md >}}

{{< include environmental/ecology-ecosystems.md >}}

{{< include environmental/ecosystem-their-management-and-conservation.md >}}

{{< include environmental/environmental-degradation.md >}}

{{< include environmental/environmental-education-and-legislation.md >}}

{{< include environmental/environmental-hazards-and-pollution.md >}}

{{< include environmental/environmental-hazards-and-remedial-measures.md >}}

{{< include environmental/environmental-policies-governance.md >}}

{{< include environmental/environmental-policy.md >}}

{{< include environmental/forms-and-functions-of-ecosystems.md >}}

{{< include environmental/genesis-of-soils.md >}}

{{< include environmental/global-and-regional-ecological-changes-and-imbalances.md >}}

{{< include environmental/grassland.md >}}

{{< include environmental/human-ecological-adaptations.md >}}

{{< include environmental/influence-of-man-on-ecology-and-environment.md >}}

{{< include environmental/major-gene-pool-centres.md >}}

{{< include environmental/marine.md >}}

{{< include environmental/mountain.md >}}

{{< include environmental/natural-hazards-disasters.md >}}

{{< include environmental/ozone-depletion.md >}}

{{< include environmental/physical-factors-influencing-world-distribution-of-plants-and-animals.md >}}

{{< include environmental/principle-ecology.md >}}

{{< include environmental/problems-of-deforestation-and-conservation-measures.md >}}

{{< include environmental/social-forestry-agro-forestry.md >}}

{{< include environmental/soil-erosion-degradation-and-conservation.md >}}

{{< include environmental/soil-profile.md >}}

{{< include environmental/sustainable-development.md >}}

{{< include environmental/wild-life.md >}}
